title: Pulmonary Sarcoidosis
chief_complaint: I've had a dry cough for 3 months. I'm tired all the time. My eyes are red and painful. I have these tender red bumps on my shins.

hidden_data.cxr: Bilateral hilar lymphadenopathy (BHL) with right paratracheal adenopathy. Stage I. No parenchymal involvement.
hidden_data.ct_chest: Mediastinal and hilar lymphadenopathy. No fibrosis.
hidden_data.biopsy: Transbronchial biopsy: Non-caseating granulomas. AFB and fungal stains negative.

correct_diagnosis: Pulmonary Sarcoidosis Stage I with Erythema Nodosum and Uveitis (Löfgren Syndrome)
key_learning_points: Löfgren syndrome = BHL + Erythema Nodosum + Arthralgias + Uveitis. Excellent prognosis, 80% resolve spontaneously
Non-caseating granulomas on biopsy = hallmark. Must rule out TB and fungal infection
Stage I = BHL only. Stage II = BHL + parenchymal. Stage III = parenchymal only. Stage IV = fibrosis
Treatment: NSAIDs for erythema nodosum. Prednisone for symptomatic pulmonary disease, uveitis, hypercalcemia, or cardiac/CNS involvement
